This particular listing is for a Surface Pro bundle that comes with a keyboard, which typically goes for $1,640. Today’s deal takes $640 off that price to deliver one of the most notable discounts we’ve seen on a Surface Pro 2-in-1 in a while. The bundle highlighted here delivers some serious value at this discounted price, considering just the Surface Pro 2-in-1 notebook included in this bundle is fetching $1,150 by itself at Amazon right now. items.title: Severe Linux Copy Fail security flaw uncovered using AI scanning help
items.summary: Nearly every Linux distribution released since 2017 is currently vulnerable to a security bug called "Copy Fail" that allows any user to give themselves administrator privileges.
